data.title: Italy's March Harmonized CPI Finalized at 1.6%
data.description: Italy's harmonized consumer price index (CPI) for March was finalized at an annual rate of 1.6%, according to Jin10. This figure slightly exceeded the anticipated rate of 1.5% and matched the previous month's rate of 1.50%.

data.title: Switzerland to Tighten Foreign Real Estate Purchase Restrictions Amid Housing Shortages
data.description: Switzerland is set to implement stricter regulations on foreign real estate purchases as the country faces increasing housing shortages. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's intention to address the growing demand for housing by limiting foreign investments in local properties. The move comes as Switzerland experiences a surge in housing demand, exacerbated by limited availability and rising prices. The proposed restrictions aim to prioritize local buyers and alleviate the pressure on the housing market. Authorities are expected to outline specific measures in the coming months, focusing on curbing foreign ownership to ensure more properties are accessible to Swiss residents. The decision reflects broader concerns about housing affordability and availability, which have become pressing issues in Switzerland's urban areas. As the government seeks to balance foreign investment with domestic needs, the new regulations are anticipated to impact the real estate market significantly.

data.title: South Korean President to Attend European-Led Summit on Strait of Hormuz Security
data.description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung is expected to participate in a European-led summit focused on securing shipping routes through the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg posted on X that this summit comes ahead of President Lee's planned visits to India and Vietnam. The Strait of Hormuz is a critical maritime passage, and discussions at the summit will likely address strategies to ensure safe navigation and stability in the region. President Lee's involvement underscores South Korea's commitment to international cooperation on maritime security issues.

data.title: Oil Prices Rise as WTI and Brent Crude Show Gains
data.description: WTI crude oil prices have increased by 1.00%, currently trading at $92.38 per barrel. According to Odaily, Brent crude oil has also seen an upward movement, reaching $93 per barrel with a daily increase of 0.84%.

data.title: ORDI continues to rise, breaking through 5 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 104%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that ORDI has continued to rise and broken through 5 USDT, currently trading at 5.245 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 104%.

data.title: Both WTI and Brent crude oil prices rose, with WTI crude oil extending its daily gain to 1.00%.
data.description: Gate data shows that WTI crude oil rose 1.00% intraday, currently trading at $92.38 per barrel. Brent crude oil touched $93 per barrel, up 0.84% ​​intraday.

data.title: BitMart contracts will be listed on CHIPUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch CHIPUSDT perpetual contracts on April 16, 2026 at 18:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Prices Stabilize Above $4,800 Amid Optimism in U.S.-Iran Talks
data.description: Gold prices have stabilized above $4,800 per ounce, supported by optimistic sentiment surrounding U.S.-Iran negotiations and a decline in oil prices. According to Jin10, analysts from ING have noted that while gold experienced a significant drop due to liquidity pressures, the recovery of some losses has occurred as growth concerns reemerge and price volatility diminishes. The analysts highlighted that rising real interest rates, a stronger dollar, and profit-taking may exert pressure on short-term movements. However, the recent pullback indicates that underlying demand remains robust.

data.title: AI Tools Lower Development Costs in Web3 Ecosystems, Says TON Foundation VP
data.description: Startups developing within ecosystems like Telegram and TON must focus on achieving product-market fit, retention, and native platform integration, according to Anthony Tsivarev, Vice President of TON Foundation. According to NS3.AI, Tsivarev highlighted that AI tools are reducing development costs and have the potential to support multi-ecosystem products and the use of AI agents in Web3 environments.

data.title: Expert Claims CIA Could Be Behind Bitcoin Creation
data.description: Professor Jiang, known for his Predictive History channel with 2.3 million YouTube subscribers, recently shared his views on the Jack Neel Podcast. According to NS3.AI, Jiang suggested that game theory indicates the CIA might be the most probable creator of Bitcoin. He characterized blockchain technology as a potential tool for surveillance and covert finance. However, analysts Ansel Lindner and Lyn Alden dismissed this assertion, arguing that it reflects a misunderstanding of Bitcoin's decentralized nature.

data.title: Swiss Central Bank Forecasts GDP Growth for 2026 and 2027
data.description: The Swiss Central Bank has projected that Switzerland's GDP will grow by approximately 1% in 2026 and around 1.5% in 2027. According to Jin10, these forecasts reflect the bank's outlook on the country's economic performance over the next two years. The projections are part of the central bank's ongoing assessment of economic conditions and are subject to change based on future developments.

data.title: Swiss Central Bank Highlights Global Economic Developments as Key Risk to Swiss Economy and Inflation
data.description: The Swiss Central Bank has identified global economic developments as the primary risk to Switzerland's economic and inflation outlook. According to Jin10, the bank emphasized that external factors could significantly impact the country's economic stability and inflation rates. The Swiss Central Bank continues to monitor these global trends closely to assess their potential effects on the domestic economy.

data.title: Swiss Franc Appreciation to Mitigate Inflation Pressure, Swiss Central Bank Says
data.description: The Swiss Central Bank has indicated that the appreciation of the Swiss Franc over the medium term is expected to reduce inflationary pressures. According to Jin10, this currency strengthening is anticipated to offset potential secondary effects arising from rising energy prices. The bank's statement highlights the role of the Swiss Franc in stabilizing the economy amid fluctuating global energy costs.

data.title: Odin Fun to Release Update on Security Breach
data.description:
Odin Fun co-founder Bob Bodily announced that the team will provide an update on the recent attack within the next 24 hours. According to Foresight News, the platform aims to resume trading activities within 48 hours.

Previously, on April 1, Odin Fun experienced an unusual large-scale sell-off, primarily involving a few meme coins such as BURRITO and CRYPTOBURG. Following this, multiple users reported irregularities in their account balances and unauthorized withdrawals of BTC and tokens.

data.title: The Lido Growth Committee's multisignature wallet received 4.82 million LDO tokens, possibly related to the execution of a buyback.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, 4.82 million LDO (approximately $1.81 million) were transferred from Binance to a multi-signature wallet managed by the Lido Growth Committee early this morning. This wallet is alleged to be used to execute a buyback. Lido passed a proposal three days ago to use up to 10,000 stETH to buy back LDO, and the Growth Committee also announced the execution parameters for the first buyback of 1,000 stETH two days ago. In addition, this multi-signature wallet also received 4.82 million LDO from market maker Portofino early this morning.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Bullish Options Decline as Silver Confidence Wavers
data.description: Gold bullish options have seen a continuous reduction, while bearish options have generally increased below this price level. According to Jin10, confidence in silver reaching higher levels remains insufficient, although bearish options have shifted from overall accumulation to single-point bets.

data.title: Economic Growth Surges Amid Rising Concerns Over Iran Conflict
data.description: Economic growth has shown a significant increase just before the onset of tensions with Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this development comes as companies like Tesco express growing concerns over the potential impacts of the conflict. As businesses brace for possible disruptions, the economic landscape remains uncertain. Meanwhile, the golf season offers a variety of dining options for enthusiasts looking to enjoy the sport. Stay informed with the latest updates as the situation unfolds.

data.title: AI's Impact on Blockchain Anonymity: Z Protocol's Privacy Efforts
data.description: AI is increasingly influencing the realm of blockchain anonymity. According to PANews, Z Protocol is actively working to enhance privacy measures for AI agents. The initiative aims to address concerns about the erosion of anonymity on blockchain platforms due to advancements in artificial intelligence. By implementing robust privacy solutions, Z Protocol seeks to safeguard user data and maintain confidentiality in the face of evolving AI technologies. This development highlights the ongoing efforts to balance technological progress with privacy protection in the digital landscape.

data.title: A trader bought and distributed airdrops of CUC when its market capitalization was only $6,000. The airdrops are now worth approximately $6.4 million.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, trader @fibonacki purchased 37.45% of the total supply of Solana ecosystem Meme token unc when its market capitalization was only $6,000. He then airdropped 33.85% of the supply to over 2,000 on-chain addresses, including several well-known traders. The airdrop is currently worth approximately $6.4 million, with the largest tier of 1% (sent to 22 traders) worth nearly $200,000.

data.title: Pakistan's Foreign Ministry: The date for the next round of US-Iran talks has not yet been set.
data.description: Pakistan's Foreign Ministry: The date for the next round of US-Iran talks has not yet been set. (Jinshi)
